title: Parkside Commons Lot Sale $45K, SPD Item Confirmation, Assessment Items
summary: Councilor Monto presents items 49-53. Item 49 ready for Monday. Item 50 (SPD item) confirmed ready by Chief Trudeau. Item 51 -- Michael Layman presents city selling vacant lot at 2016-2024 Fayette St East/Ellis to Parkside Commons for $45,000 (appraised value) for Phase 1 south-side construction. Layman notes title should say 'not less than' $45K to cover recording/title costs. Brief discussion of lot location relative to Parkside development phases -- south side of East Fayette, corner lot at Ellis near former bakery site.
